titleStmt.title: SII 26.773: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 773. (A.R. No. 722 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is built in the middle and its continuation is not available.
It contains a part of the praśasti of the king commencing with Tiṅgaḷērtaru, etc. Another piece also contains a part of a praśasti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷertaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭai
kiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaṭ puṇarntu ceṅkolo
ccik karuṅkali kaṭintu taṉ ciṟiya tātai ṉama
yaṉaiyuṅkuṟikoḷ taṉiḷaṅkokkaḷai t
n tirupputalvar tammaiyuntuṉṟeḻi va
llavaṉ miṉavaṉ kaṅkaṉ Ilaṅkayaṟ ki ḻa
ṉ kaṉṉakkucciyar kāvalaneṉaṉappoṉṉaṇicuṭa
kuṭañcūṭṭippaṭar pukaḻāṅkavarkkavar nāṭaruḷippā
tai ṉavanta potalar teriyal vikkiramanāraṇaṉ
mavaṭippattaruḷaṟ kavaṉavataritta vorupati nā
ṇimauli vāḻiyar pūventira coḻaneṉṉap pūma
nātu maṉṉu pallūḻiyum teṉṉavar muvaruḷ māṉāparaṇaṉ
poṉmuṭiyāṉāpparu matiṭ pacuntalai porukaḷat terin
tu vāraḷaviya kaḻal virakeraḷaṉai muṉai vayiṟ piṭittut taṉa
tti vāraṇak katak kaṭakkaḷiṟṟāyutaippittaruḷi Antamil peru
m pukaḻc cuntarapāṇṭiya ṉoṟṟai veṇkuṭaiyuṅ kaṟ
ṟai veṇkavariyuñ ciṅkācaṉamum veṅkaḷattiḻantu taṉmuṭi
viḻattalai virittaṭi taḷarntoṭat(toṭat) tolleyil mullai
yūrtturatti yol kali veṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭ
ṭotukki mevirapukaḻirāma kuṭamuvar keṭa muṇintu miṭa
keḻal vilavaṉ kaṭarmaṭikkoṇṭu taṉnāṭu viṭṭoṭik kā
ṭu pukkoḷippa vañciyam putumalar milaintāṅ keñcalil velaike
ḻu kān=taḷurccālai kalamaṟuppittāhavamallaṉu mañcaṟa kevutaṉ
ṟāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuṭ kaṇṭappayaṉuṅ kaṅkātira
ṉum maṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭum maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritaruvikkiyum vicaiyāti
ttaṉu n=tirumuraṭ cāṅkamayaṉumuta ruvottuṭaiya nimir
yuṅkoṇṭu tuṉṉār koḷḷippākkai Uḷḷeri maṭuppittoru taṉittaṇṭāṟ
poru kaṭalilaṅkayar komāṉ vikkiramabāhuviṉ makuṭamum ṉakkuṭaintu te
ṉṟamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatumiḻantu Eḻukaṭaliḻampu ṅkecaṉākiya vik
kiramapāṇṭiyaṉ parumaṇiyaṇi makuṭamuṅ kāṇṭaku ṉatākiya kaṉṉa
kucciyilum Ārkali yiḻañciriteṉṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷaṉṉāṭu tuṉṉuṟa
voṭum pukuntu viḷaṅku muṭikavitta viracalāmekaṉ porkkaḷattuBuilt in.

ṭakkac � yāracaṉuṅkuṉi cilai muñcaṉun taṇṭanāyaṉ Irttaṉañcayaṉumiṉa nāṭṭup poykai kū
ṉum viramāṇikkaṉu meṉaippaṭaiñaro ṭetir camattu kiracacūkarācaṉum vaṉa Aṇaiviyarum vākai vicca brāhmaṇaṉ pāratāya
pakaṉumā tāvu meṉumātā meśvavo mutaliya puṉaikaḻalaraicaroṭeṇṇaru makaḷiraittuṇṇeṭi nāraṇaṉ cir ciṅka
p piṭippitteḻaraiyilakkamum pāḻpaṭac ciṉavup puṇarāka kaṭakka poṭippaṭutta taṉavaiyiliṇṭu Irakka mutta naimaccivāyaṉu
m Ivaṉṟampinam
Digital edition of SII 26.773 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
